feed.title: SAP Community - Settlement Management
feed.subtitle: Settlement Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to use create condition contract when the condition involves product hierarchy 2
entry.content:
Hello,

One of our condition contracts involve using product hierarchy 2 as a key field (Both for determination of business volume as well as pricing condition) . Since the volume is high, we wrote a program to upload the data using BAPI_CONDITION_CONTRACT_CREATE. We are able to create the condition contract and settle it manually. But the upload program using BAPI does not work, due to PRODH2 not being a key SAP field . I end up with an error to update the key field product hierarchy 2 (W_CB 064). We tried extending BAPI_TE_KOMG with PRODH2 . But the error continues. Any help from the experts is welcome.

entry.title: CCM - WB2R_SC - Partial Settlement
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am using standard configuration for condition contract settlement process.

While using tcode WB2R_SC accounting document not generated.

For Delta accrual - Settlement document & accounting document generated. Posting Status shown Green ticked in settlement document - but Tax code missing at line item level in accounting document. why?

For Partial settlement - Settlement document created & posting status shown Blocked for accounting - Accounting document not generated. Why standard setting like this? I have Spro checked Configuration also.

Posting block for Transfer to Accounting - Unchecked

Same settings for delta accrual settlement type, but its working fine with accounting posting

Final Settlement - I am getting error WB2R130 - Settlement document for xx.xx.xxxx (date) are still changeable

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Billing document not shown in BUSVOL report - CC#
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Pleae guide me on the below issue.

Issue : We have Created a Single payee Condition contract with Business volume selection critetia as Customer and Product hirarchy (PH) with Level one.

System was indentified the business voulme with above combination  and shown the billing document in BUSVOL report .

In our material master we have complete PH with level 5, due to cleansing activity we replaced the PH in material master which is casuing incorrect values in Delta and Settlemnet , becasue after replacening new PH in Material master our billing documnet was disappread from BUSVOL report , but still exist in Customer Invoices - Business Volume Determination (WCB_VBRK_VBRP_BV)

Q: Please guide me is there any way that we can bring back the billing documnets to BUSVOL without change the PH back to original one . Becase, so far we are using the incorrect PH that is why replaced with correct one .

CC

Material master 

We have replaced the level 5 PH and Level 1 which is 05 is same before and after replace new PH ,but the billing document was removed from Busvol report .

Pleae guide me to fix the issue and guide me how system get the trnsaction data from Billing and table WCB_VBRK_VBRP_BV values to BUSVOL report.

Thanks,

Venkatesh Rampe

entry.title: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on invoices of multiple customers
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to do some custom development in the condition contract management process (or is there another option), so that a sales rebate agreement for a single customer is used to issue a credit note/memo based on invoices of other multiple customers, considering that there are no sales to this customer for which the agreement is created, but a credit note has to be issued to this customer based on the other customer's invoices. There is a connection between this customer and the other customers, outside SAP, which require this.

Thank you!

entry.title: Delta Accrual Posting Zero Value
entry.content:
We have a condition contract where we have executed a delta accrual for the date 20.03.2025 and the accounting documents have been created correctly i.e. debit expense account and credit provision account.

We have executed delta accrual again for the date 21.03.2025 and an incorrect accounting document has been created which debit and credit the same account i.e. Expense account. The customer has no new billing document created for 21.03.2025. We have a background program running daily for delta accruals. 

The expectation is that the no delta accrual document would be created since there is no billing document for the same date.

Please assist, I am not sure if there is a configuration which I have and is incorrect.

entry.title: Condition contract management conditions RES1 vs REA1
entry.content:
Hello,

When reading about the difference between RES1 and REA1, I read that:

"Condition type RES1 Rebate:

You use this condition type RES1 in a condition contract to maintain rebate conditions in the sales rebate scenarios

Condition type REA1 Rebate Accruals:

You use this condition type REA1 in a condition contract to maintain accruals conditions in the sales rebate scenarios."

What is the difference between rebate and accruals?

Is the rebate referring maybe to the time before CCM and it is the same as discounts being part of the sales order pricing procedure or something else, but in CCM maybe not visible there anymore or how is it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Condition contract management overwrite the accrual amounts with a fixed sum
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible when using CCM to manually overwrite or enter a sum/amount to be credited to the customer, could be at any of partial, delta or final settlement phase, with a fixed amount, if there were accruals applied?

Thank you!

entry.title: Condition contract management set different document number ranges for accruals credit memos
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to set different credit memos number ranges when using accruals, such that one number range is not transferred to financial accounting e.g. for accruals and the other real credit memo (e.g. created at partial and final settlements) has another number range which is then transferred to financial accounting?

Thank you!

entry.title: Moving Average is not updating in S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
SFG material master was created with 0 value.

MTO Scenario - Production Order for SFG material was created in Plant 1100 with reference to CIR created in Plant 1200. After the Production Order settlement , moving average is not updating in plant 1100 in S4HANA where as in similar scenario in ECC, moving average is updating. Please help!

entry.title: Settlement Management - Conditon Contract Validity in past
entry.content:
Creating a contract in the past and then attempting to run settlememt for delta accruals

Found that the pricing date is set to posting date which has to be in the open period and is outside of validity

We therefore get 0 accruals because the price conditions are not valid

Any ideas on how to correct other than changing price date determination which means we would need to create new settlement doc types because we have used standard

 

Tim

entry.title: Issue with Workflows: Business Object-Link not redirecting to WZR3 in SAP Settlement Management
entry.content:
We have implemented release strategies in SAP Workflows following the four-eyes principle, one for condition contracts and another for settlement documents.

When approving a condition contract or settlement document from the Workflow inbox, we see a description and a link to the document. We have implemented SAP Standard Tasks:

  • 2000616 (WZRE - Settlement Management)

  • 2000679 (WCB_CC_BAPI Condition Contract)

For condition contracts, the link correctly redirects to transaction WCOCO, displaying the relevant document. However, for settlement documents, the expected behavior—redirecting to WZR3—does not occur. Instead, the link does not navigate anywhere.

A notable difference:

  • In the Objects and Attachments section, the condition contract link displays "Condition Contract: XXXXX"

  • The settlement document link instead shows "Business Object: XXXXX" instead of "Settlement Document: XXXXX"

How can I adjust this redirection so that the settlement document link correctly opens WZR3 with the corresponding document?

entry.title: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple Sold To parties
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Settlement Management- Condition Contracts.

We have a scenario where we have one Bill- To assigned to Multiple Sold-To Parties. During settlement in Condition contracts, from Bill To party the correct Sold to Party has to be determined from business volume and price of that sold to has to be determined in the Settlement Document from condition records to settle to the customer.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Empty profit center from billing documents gets overwritten in CCM
entry.content:
Hello, 

we are facing the following issue at the customer:

the profit center is defined as a split criterium in CCM and for some billing documents the profit center is empty . As the profit center is a split criterium, we expect that also on the relevant settlement document item the profit center will be empty during the Delta accrual. However it gets automatically overwritten by the profit center of the mat/plant combination (visible in WBRP, WCOCOF) This is causing issues during the matching when the final settlement is done because on the business volume there is no profit center available (as it is empty on the billing docs). No transfer events are defined which fill the profit center in the system.

Any advice? Is it standard SAP behaviour that the profit center gets filled in on the settlement document? This request is a bit the opposite of the issue in this blog Profit center in settlement document in CCM - SAP Community

I already tried to add a ' ' profit center in the transfer event 65 but it did not change the result. Please also see the attachement.

Many thanks ,

Ilse

entry.title: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple Sold To parties
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Settlement Management- Condition Contracts.

We have a scenario where we have one Bill- To assigned to Multiple Sold-To Parties. During settlement in Condition contracts, from Bill To party the correct Sold to Party has to be determined from business volume and price of that sold to has to be determined in the Settlement Document from condition records to settle to the customer.

i'm talking of multi-Payee 0S02 condition contract for rebate and i'm maintaining condition records with Sold to Parties in the condition contract, the sold to parties are maintained in Business volume criteria. System is creating Settlement documents with same bill to party but all the settlement documents considering only one condition record of one sold to party instead of considering condition record of each sold to party maintained in the condition records of CCM. (Scenario- One bill party assigned to Multiple Sold To Parties)

Can you please suggest ways to determine each sold to party from the same bill to party so that condition records of each sold to party is determined.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: NACE output determination issue for settlement documents
entry.content:
Hi, I'm facing an issue in NACE output determination issue for settlement documents. The Custom partner fuction is not appearing into Nace Output management for settlement.

Kindly help.

entry.title: AUC partial capitalization not completely using prior year acquisition first
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues, 

We are partially capitalizing assets on ECC 6.0 and auditors have requested an explanation as to why SAP splits the capitalization into current and prior year "streams" with transaction types 331, 336 (asset shell) 338 and 339 (AUC asset). In particular, why the system does not use all of the prior year acquisition values first, before using the current year acquisitions, even if the prior year acquisitions are sufficient to cover the total capitalization value. 

The image below shows the AUC acquisitions in 22/23 of 4,511,271.95.

In 23/24, further acquisitions of 2,313,975.22 was settled to the AUC asset.

When a partial capitalization of 3,453,275.80 was done in 23/24, the value was split into 1,170,770 current year acquisition and 2,282,505.80 prior year acquisition.

Instead of decreasing the prior year (22/23) acquisition value of 4,511,271.95 down to 1,057,996.15. 

From what I can determine, SAP used the total acquisitions for current and prior year: 6,825,247.17 and calculated the % of prior and current acquisitions to the acquisition total. And then applied this percentage during the capitalization process. 66% to 34%. 

Is it SAP standard or best business practice to calculate this split in such a manner? Or is this a configurable calculation. If so, which table or transaction code can be used to view, amend and/or substantiate this calculation?

The assistance would be much appreciated. 

Kind Regards,

Vaughan

AUC transaction detail

entry.title: Missing Profit Center (VBRP-PRCTR) in Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

We are facing an issue where the profit center (field VBRP-PRCTR) is missing from several billing document items due to the customize logic. However, the value still exists in the corresponding COPA document.

This issue is currently blocking our business from performing delta accrual postings, due to the missing profit center value in the billing item. It causes delays in our financial closing process and affects the accuracy of our monthly reporting.

Upon further investigation, we found that the required value still exists in the COPA table. Therefore, we are considering the following workaround as a temporary solution:

  • Develop a custom Z-program to retrieve PRCTR from COPA table where RBELN = Billing Document Number and RPOSN = Item Number.
  • Update the missing value back into VBRP-PRCTR for affected billing documents.

We plan to execute this program during non-business hours to minimize system impact.

So, has anyone encountered this kind of situation before? Is our proposed solution technically feasible and safe, or are there any alternative recommendations you would suggest?

entry.title: Database table for business volume data is stored for a condition contract
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Below are the questions i need support on if anyone has worked on custom changes in condition contract settlement process.

Q1.What is the database table in which the Business Volume data is stored for a condition contract(The billing documents and quantities).I need to build a custom logic to fetch the data and perform some calculations on it but i am struggling to fine.

Q2.If we create custom fields in a condition contract header, is it possible to use those fields in a pricing routine or the fields absolutelty need to be part of the pricing structure?

Thanks,

entry.title: Custom Accrual condition not being reversed
entry.content:
We are using standard sale rebate contract (0S01) and pricing procedure A10005. We added one custom condition as Accruals (because we did not want to settle this directly with customer) as ZREP which will be a percentage based condition of the business volume. During the partial settlement rebate condition RES1 is being corrected by RES2 which holds the previous settlement value but the custom accrual condition is not being corrected. It calculates the value based on complete business volume without reversing it. Below are few screenshots of config already done:

Any help will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: WB2_REFERENCE_DOCUMENTS
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project that requires the implementation of custom logic using the BAdIs WB2R_DOCUMENT_CREATE and WB2_REFERENCE_DOCUMENTS. However, I have been unable to find detailed information or documentation about these specific BAdIs.

Could anyone provide insights or share documentation on the following points?

  1. WB2R_DOCUMENT_CREATE:

    • Purpose and typical use cases
    • Implementation examples
    • Any specific prerequisites or considerations

  2. WB2_REFERENCE_DOCUMENTS:

    • Purpose and typical use cases
    • Implementation examples
    • Any specific prerequisites or considerations

Any help or pointers to relevant resources would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your assistance.
